# instill

> Curate and sync a project-specific skill library for Claude Code and other AI coding agents.

`instill` manages a manifest of AI coding skills per project. It creates and
reconciles symlinks in `.claude/skills/` so that Claude Code can load only the
skills relevant to the project being worked on.

## Module

`github.com/AvogadroSg1/instill`

## Key Concepts

- **Skill** — a directory in the library containing a `SKILL.md` file. The name
  is the directory name (e.g. `golang-testing`).
- **Library** — a directory of skill subdirectories. Configured via
  `SKILL_LIBRARY_PATH` or `~/.config/instill/config.json`.
- **Manifest** — `.claude/skill-manifest.json` at the project root. Committed to
  git. Contains `{"skills": ["skill-a", "skill-b"]}` (always sorted, deduped).
- **Symlink dir** — `.claude/skills/` — gitignored directory of symlinks managed
  by `instill`. Each symlink points into the library.
- **Category registry** — optional `.categories.json` at the library root.
  Groups skills for display in the interactive TUI.

## CLI Commands

```
instill init-project [--skills name,...] [--force]
    Initialize .claude/skill-manifest.json and .claude/skills/.
    Launches interactive TUI unless --skills is given.

instill pick-skills [name...] [--remove name,...]
    Add/remove skills. No args = interactive TUI.

instill check-skills
    Reconcile .claude/skills/ symlinks with the manifest.
    Removes stale symlinks; creates missing ones; prunes library-removed skills.

instill show-library [--filter substring]
    List skills in the configured library.
    Marks selected skills if run inside a project.

instill add-hooks
    Add `instill check-skills` as a SessionStart hook to .claude/settings.json.
```

## Configuration

| Source | Key |
|--------|-----|
| Env var | `SKILL_LIBRARY_PATH` |
| File | `~/.config/instill/config.json` → `library_path` |
| TTY prompt | written to config file on first run |

## Exit Codes

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| 0 | Success |
| 1 | General error |
| 2 | Environment error (library not configured/found, no TTY) |
| 3 | Filesystem error |

## Source Layout

```
main.go                         entry point; calls cli.Execute()
internal/cli/                   Cobra command wiring (commandConfig injection)
  root.go                       Execute(), newRootCommand()
  init_project.go               init-project command
  pick_skills.go                pick-skills command
  check_skills.go               check-skills command
  show_library.go               show-library command
  add_hooks.go                  add-hooks command
internal/instill/               pure domain logic
  project.go                    Project type; FindProject()
  manifest.go                   Manifest type; ReadManifest(), WriteManifestAtomic()
  library.go                    SkillExists(), ListLibrarySkills(), FilterSkills()
  config.go                     ResolveLibraryPath(); config file read/write
  categories.go                 LoadCategories(); CategoryForSkill()
  reconcile.go                  ReconcileManifest(); symlink lifecycle
  init_project.go               InitProject(); gitignore management
  pick_skills.go                PickSkills(); ApplySkillSelection()
  show_library.go               ShowLibrary()
  add_hooks.go                  AddHooks(); settings.json hook injection
  skill_picker.go               RunPickSkillsTUI() — Bubbletea TUI
  errors.go                     ExitError; NewExitError(); ExitCode()
  atomic.go                     writeFileAtomic()
```

## Design Notes

- All manifest and config writes use `writeFileAtomic` (write `.tmp`, rename) to
  prevent partial-write corruption.
- Skill names are validated with `IsValidSkillName` — must be a single, safe
  path element (no `/`, `..`, absolute paths).
- The TUI (`RunPickSkillsTUI`) is injected via `commandConfig.pickSkillsTUI` so
  that CLI commands are fully testable without a terminal.
- `internal/instill` has no dependency on `os.Std*` — all I/O is passed
  explicitly so the domain is testable in isolation.
